name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_coefficient_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisCoefficientAcceptanceGate keeps full static-airframe coefficient seeds out of gameplay fitting until every multi-axis sweep is live-runtime fit-ready bounded and forward/reverse sign-consistent.
note: Reference surface for full static-airframe multi-axis coefficient gameplay-fit acceptance gating.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_coefficient_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisCoefficientSeed supplies normalized signed body-axis inlet-axis moment and pressure-center coefficient seeds for all planned sweeps.
note: Reference surface for full static-airframe multi-axis coefficient gameplay-fit acceptance gating.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisRunMatrix supplies compact force moment pressure-center run summaries for every forward reverse sideslip and angle-of-attack sweep.
note: Reference surface for full static-airframe multi-axis coefficient gameplay-fit acceptance gating.

name: drone_physics_airframe
value: DronePhysics owns the gameplay sideforce lift moment pressure-center and body drag paths that future live multi-axis coefficients may inform after this gate opens.
note: Reference surface for full static-airframe multi-axis coefficient gameplay-fit acceptance gating.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live multi-axis L2 wind-tunnel force/moment coefficient fitting.
note: Reference surface for full static-airframe multi-axis coefficient gameplay-fit acceptance gating.

name: acceptance_bounds
value: abs force <= 35; abs signed axial <= 35; moment magnitude <= 20; pressure-center offset <= 2; forward/reverse axial product < 0
note: Acceptance bounds keep test fixtures and incomplete live multi-axis fits out of gameplay tuning.
